ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment used (e.g., automated station, manual station) */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Whether the station is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station where the data was recorded */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature recorded in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of weather conditions (e.g., light rain) */,
  "dt" TEXT /* Date and time of the data entry */,
  "wind_deg" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in m/s */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the data entry */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to nearest urban area in kilometers */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* Ultraviolet radiation index */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in Celsius */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station issuing the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., severe weather, flood warning) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the alert issuance */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert expires */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the alert location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the alert location */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Description of the affected areas */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the weather condition */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather condition */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon to represent the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind direction (e.g., North, South-East) */,
  "degrees" REAL /* Degrees representing the wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the nearest urban area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that recorded the temperature */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Recorded temperature value */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the record */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in Celsius */,
  "heat_index" REAL /* Heat index in Celsius */,
  "wind_chill" REAL /* Wind chill factor in Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_weather_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station for which the historical data is recorded */,
  "temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded during the period */,
  "temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded during the period */,
  "humidity_avg" REAL /* Average humidity recorded during the period */,
  "pressure_avg" REAL /* Average atmospheric pressure recorded during the period */,
  "wind_speed_avg" REAL /* Average wind speed recorded during the period */,
  "precipitation_sum" REAL /* Total precipitation during the period */,
  "uv_index_avg" REAL /* Average UV index during the period */,
  "visibility_avg" REAL /* Average visibility during the period */,
  "dew_point_avg" REAL /* Average dew point temperature during the period */,
  "cloud_cover_avg" REAL /* Average cloud cover during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that uploaded the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the data upload */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the uploaded data file in megabytes */,
  "upload_method" TEXT /* Method used for the upload (e.g., FTP, API) */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the quality check */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the quality check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check (e.g., range check, consistency check) */,
  "check_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the quality check */,
  "check_tool" TEXT /* Tool or method used for the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
